name: Terran Orbital Corporation Common Stock
summary: Terran Orbital Corporation is a leading manufacturer of small satellites and end-to-end space solutions, providing earth observation, satellite imagery, and other data services. Based in Boca Raton, Florida, Terran Orbital serves governmental and commercial clients with its vertically integrated capabilities, including satellite design, production, launch support, and on-orbit operations. Their satellites and services are used for a variety of applications, including defense, intelligence, and environmental monitoring.
